education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical
raw_text:
27. CAD/CAM Tooling Engineer

Job Summary  
Responsible for creating CAD models and CAM programs for machining tooling 
components.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Develop 3D models and 2D drawings  
• Generate CNC programs using CAM software  
• Optimize machining strategies and tool paths  
• Simulate machining processes  
• Support CNC machining and troubleshooting  
• Maintain CAD/CAM documentation  
Required Skills  
• CAD/CAM software (NX CAM, Mastercam, PowerMill)  
• CNC programming knowledge  
• Understandin g of machining processes  
• Analytical thinking  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical  
Experience  
• 2–6 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹30,000 – ₹65,000 per month
